summary: pre-1 check failed: task 162 OptionSome/OptionNone variants absent from codebase. Escalated as esc-163-25. No implementation steps taken.

Added OptionSome/OptionNone variants to CompiledExprKind in reify-types, plus walk/collect/remap arms and constructors. Added stub eval_expr arms and option_eval_tests.rs with step-1 tests. Blocked: reify-compiler/src/lib.rs:collect_body_refs_inner() also matches on CompiledExprKind exhaustively and needs OptionSome/OptionNone arms — outside task scope. Escalated.

All 6 steps complete. Fixed reify-compiler collect_body_refs_inner exhaustive match (OptionSome/OptionNone arms). Implemented OptionNone => Value::Option(None) and OptionSome(inner) => Value::Option(Some(Box::new(eval(inner)))) in eval_expr. 12 tests in option_eval_tests.rs all pass. Full reify-expr suite clean.

All 14 steps complete. Added 7 diamond hierarchy test functions covering: single-bound satisfied, missing member single error, default injected once, constraint from root, members at every level, let default deduped, deep 5-level diamond. All 24 trait conformance tests pass. Implementation was complete from task 188 (visited HashSet in collect_all_requirements). No code changes needed.
No new steps completed

Add `meta_block` and `meta_entry` rules to tree-sitter grammar. meta_block = 'meta' '{' commaSep(meta_entry) '}'. meta_entry = field('key', $.identifier) '=' field('value', $.string_literal). Add meta_block to the `_member` choice. Add 'meta' to the `word` conflicts list if needed.; Regenerate tree-sitter parser: run `tree-sitter generate` in tree-sitter-reify/ to produce updated parser.c, grammar.json, node-types.json.; Add MetaBlockDecl struct to reify-syntax/src/lib.rs: `pub struct MetaBlockDecl { pub entries: Vec<(String, String)>, pub span: SourceSpan }`. Add `MetaBlock(MetaBlockDecl)` variant to the `MemberDecl` enum.; Add `lower_meta_block()` to reify-syntax/src/ts_parser.rs. Handle 'meta_block' in `lower_member()` match. Iterate meta_entry children, extract identifier key and string_literal value (strip quotes). Return `MemberDecl::MetaBlock(MetaBlockDecl { entries, span })`.; Add `MetaAccess { entity: String, key: String }` variant to `CompiledExprKind` enum in reify-types/src/expr.rs. Add the variant to `walk()` (leaf node, no children), `collect_value_refs_inner()` (no refs), and `remap_entity()` (update entity if it matches from_entity). Add `meta_access(entity, key)` constructor on `CompiledExpr` with tag byte 16, result_type Type::String, content_hash from entity+key.; Add `pub meta: HashMap<String, String>` field to `TopologyTemplate` struct in reify-compiler/src/lib.rs. Update the TopologyTemplate construction at the end of compile_entity to include `meta`. Add `meta_entries: HashMap<String, String>` field to `CompilationScope` struct and initialize it as empty in `CompilationScope::new()`.

All 12 steps complete. Steps 1-9 were done in prior iteration (uncommitted step-10). Committed step-10 (duplicate meta block detection), wrote step-11 test (meta_access_in_constraint_context with constraint keyword), verified step-12 (no changes needed). All 6 meta_compile_tests pass.

Implemented steps 1-4: implicitly_converts_to() with Vector<->Tensor<1> (bidirectional) and Scalar<->Tensor<0> (bidirectional, N ignored) rules. 11 tests pass. Steps 5-12 blocked: Type::Matrix missing from reify-types/src/ty.rs due to regression in commit 3a248e07. Escalated as esc-231-47.

All 12 steps complete. Steps 5-12 implemented after Type::Matrix regression was fixed by handler. implicitly_converts_to() has all 4 rules (Vector<->Tensor1, Scalar<->Tensor0, Tensor2->Matrix one-way). type_compatible() delegates to implicitly_converts_to() bidirectionally. Wired into trait conformance and field composition. 30 implicit_conversion_tests + full compiler suite pass.

All steps already complete from prior iterations. Marked pre-2 as done (Type::Matrix was restored in commit 11127e90). All 30 implicit_conversion_tests pass. Task 231 is fully complete.

All 16 steps complete. Added auto_match_port_members helper in lib.rs that matches Param/Auto members by name between same-trait ports. Integrated into compile_connection via effective_mappings. 8 new tests in connect_compile_tests.rs covering: single-member auto-match, multiple-member sorted alphabetically, unmatched member warning, different traits skip, explicit mapping priority, dotted ports skip, empty members vacuous match, chain desugaring. All 21 connect_compile_tests pass.

Add `meta()` builder method to TopologyTemplateBuilder in crates/reify-test-support/src/builders.rs. Method signature: `pub fn meta(mut self, entries: HashMap<String, String>) -> Self`. Store entries in a new `meta: HashMap<String, String>` field on the builder (default empty). Use the field in build() instead of hard-coded empty HashMap.; Add `meta_map: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, String>>` field to Engine struct. Initialize as empty HashMap in Engine::new(). This stores the entity-name-to-meta-entries mapping built during eval() and reused by edit_param() and other incremental paths.

Write failing test `eval_meta_access_in_let_binding` in new file crates/reify-eval/tests/meta_eval_integration.rs. Build a TopologyTemplate 'Widget' with meta {"description": "A widget"} and a Let binding whose expr is CompiledExpr::meta_access("Widget", "description"). Eval via Engine and assert the let cell's value == Value::String("A widget"). Test will panic because eval() doesn't wire meta into EvalContext.; In Engine::eval(), after module is available: build meta_map from module.templates (filter non-empty .meta, map name->meta). Store as self.meta_map. Wire .with_meta(&self.meta_map) to all EvalContext::new() calls within eval() body: field eval (lines ~810,815), param default (908), guard expr (948), guard members (971,1008). Also wire in evaluate_let_bindings() (2809) -- pass &self.meta_map as new parameter or use self reference.; Write failing test `eval_meta_access_sub_structure` in meta_eval_integration.rs. Build two templates: 'Part' with meta {"material": "steel"} and param size, and 'Assembly' with sub_component 'part' -> 'Part' and a Let binding using CompiledExpr::meta_access("Part", "material"). Eval via Engine and assert the Assembly let cell's value == Value::String("steel"). Tests that child template meta is accessible from parent context.; Pass &self.meta_map to elaborate_child_instance() as a new parameter. Wire .with_meta(meta_map) to the three EvalContext::new() calls inside elaborate_child_instance (child arg eval ~3113, child default ~3115, child let ~3181). Update all call sites of elaborate_child_instance in eval() to pass &self.meta_map.; Write failing test `eval_meta_access_survives_edit_param` in meta_eval_integration.rs. Build a template 'Box' with meta {"tag": "v1"}, a Param 'size' with default 10.0, and a Let 'label' whose expr is meta_access("Box", "tag"). Call engine.eval(), then engine.edit_param(size_cell, new_value). Assert that after edit_param, the 'label' cell still has Value::String("v1").

Reconciled uncommitted step-10 impl: wired meta_map into eval_cached (builds map, wires 2 EvalContext calls), resolve_concurrent_edit (via ConcurrentEditSetup.meta_map), and compile_geometry_op (added meta_map param, wired 6 call sites). Fixed missing arg at test call site (line 3285). Updated plan.json to mark steps 6-10 done. All 5 meta_eval_integration tests pass. All 145+ reify-eval tests pass.

Wire .with_meta(&self.meta_map) to all EvalContext::new() calls inside edit_param() method: main re-eval (~1382), wave2 after resolution (~1457), guard re-elab members (~1482,1500), resolution wave2 (~1642), second guard re-elab (~1708,1732), collection sub cell eval (~1818).; Write failing test `eval_meta_access_in_guarded_group` in meta_eval_integration.rs. Build template 'S' with meta {"mode": "active"}, a Bool param 'active' (default true), and a guarded group whose member Let 'mode_label' uses meta_access("S", "mode"). Eval via Engine and assert mode_label == Value::String("active") when guard is true.; Verify that step-2's wiring of guard eval EvalContext calls (lines ~948, 971, 1008) already passes this test. If not, ensure the guarded group member expression evaluation at lines 971 and 1008 in eval() uses .with_meta(&self.meta_map). Guarded group evaluation in eval() evaluates member default_exprs directly -- confirm they get meta context.; Write test `eval_meta_access_cached_eval` in meta_eval_integration.rs. Call engine.eval_cached() with a module containing meta access. Assert the let binding resolves to the correct Value::String. This tests the eval_cached() incremental path.; Wire .with_meta(&self.meta_map) to EvalContext::new() calls inside eval_cached() (~2119, 2212). Also wire resolve_concurrent_edit() (~702). Add meta_map field to ConcurrentEditSetup struct, populate it in prepare_concurrent_edit() from self.meta_map. Wire compile_geometry_op() calls (~2852, 2903 and others) by passing meta_map parameter for completeness.

Write test eval_meta_access_collection_sub_component (step-11): Plate template with collection sub 'bolts'->Bolt(count=3), Let grade_label=meta_access(Bolt,grade) — immediately GREEN since meta_map clone was already functionally correct. Implement step-12 optimization: remove O(n) self.meta_map.clone() inside collection loop (~1094) and singular sub (~1139), replaced with direct &self.meta_map using Rust disjoint struct field borrows. All 6 meta_eval_integration tests and full reify-eval suite pass.

All 8 steps complete. pre-1: tree-sitter CLI v0.26.7 verified. step-1: wrote failing test parse_connect_mixed_params_and_mappings (grammar parse error on comma). step-2: changed connect_body from repeat(choice(...)) to commaSep(choice(...)) in grammar.js, ran tree-sitter generate to regenerate parser.c/grammar.json/node-types.json. step-3/4: wrote parse_connect_mixed_multiple_entries (2 params + 2 port mappings), passes immediately. step-5/6/7/8: wrote compile_connect_mixed_params_and_mappings and compile_connect_mixed_skips_auto_match, both pass with no compiler changes. All 23 connect_compile_tests and 9 connect_chain_tests pass.
